candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an interna

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium and/or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: in_illegal_residence
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting or no longer meeting the conditions for access or residence.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: absconding_criterion_met
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: At least one of the statutory objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: has_belgian_nationality
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person has Belgian nationality, as directly stated or proven in the case.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: is_eu_citizen
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: covered_by_eu_free_movement_law
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international prote

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: individual_examination_performed
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: An individual examination of the person's situation has been performed.

candidate_lower_level_symbols.name: has_valid_travel_document
candidate_lower_level_symbols.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

threshold_helper_candidates.name: absconding_criterion_met
threshold_helper_candidates.description: At least one of the statutory objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.

secondary_diagnostics_text:
missing_helper_definition (legal-effect context=False):
  helper: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions (signature=Person -> Bool; kind=unknown; hints=unknown)
  repair: define 'meets_entry_or_residence_conditions' in THEN with rules, or reclassify as case_input/background only if safe; do not rename without defining.
  - rules[2].if negated
  threshold helper candidates:
    - absconding_criterion_met (helper)
  other lower-level symbols:
    - no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay (observable)
    - subject_to_active_entry_ban (observable)
    - in_illegal_residence (derived)
    - absconding_criterion_met (helper)
    - has_belgian_nationality (observable)
    - is_eu_citizen (observable)
    - covered_by_eu_free_movement_law (observable)
    - subject_to_removal_procedure (observable)
